name: Brovius Thanderian | King of Theronia
description:
So I'd like to take a minute and just remind everyone that I'm a smutty, no good, disgusting sloot and sometimes my characters are just... well... you guys get it. This is one of those characters. Lol

Poor little Azmonian royal - lost your home, did you? Lost your betrothed too?
Daddy's got a place for you to stay, its ok.
Just come sit, right on this dick.
___



I want to make a goblin. I got requests for them and i want to make yall proud. I like both, so i need to ask you guys. Is anyone gonna be super picky about the look of my gobby? Should i make him traditional like gobby looking or should i attempt to gen a more handsome version?


Did you know about the Discord I co-own with Rosewing?

also if you didnt notice, this is just a continuation bot of the setting Alendron was in.
